name: Wood Entryway with Shelf Ivory - Threshold™: Wall Mounted Coat Rack with 5 Hooks, Silver Plated Finish
description:
This Wood Entryway Shelf from Threshold™ features a white wooden shelf that offers a top space for storage and display. It comes with five silver-finish hook points for hanging hats, coats, jackets, belts or other items. Mount it on a wall in your laundry room, bathroom, entryway or kitchen to maximize storage space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
